# Bundled NextTrace

This directory contains unmodified NextTrace Tiny v1.7.1 binaries for offline installation.

- Upstream: https://github.com/nxtrace/NTrace-core
- License: GPL-3.0
- Source archive: `NTrace-core-v1.7.1-source.tar.gz`
- `nexttrace_linux_amd64`: SHA-256 `093849f1012b065c29d307b8e47fedec667206829c14e105f83a852f60c628d1`
- `nexttrace_linux_arm64`: SHA-256 `8b134f6c6a7864b1ecc98b1f7cfae1d058ef6dcf8f0da862e3260752ce1858bd`

The binaries are installed as `/usr/local/bin/nexttrace` according to the VPS architecture.
